title: Argelasia scorpius
taxonomy: Argelasia scorpius is a genus of flowering plants in the family Boraginaceae. Argelasia scorpius, or more specifically, Argelasia scorpius, is a small, shrubby plant native to parts of South Africa. It belongs to the order Lamiales and is classified as a member of the family Boraginaceae. The plant's classification is further detailed as being in the subfamily Boraginoideae.
